document.title: Life Cycle Report for HnX-P1 Portable X-ray System

sourceSummary.oneLine: Life cycle report for HnX-P1 Portable X-ray System calculating capacitor life and setting expected service life.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Documents component life cycle selection and sets the Expected Service Life of HnX-P1.
keyPoints: The document is the life cycle of the HnX-P1.
The selected vulnerable part is a capacitor on the Inverter ass’y board at C9/C10/C14/C28/C29.
The capacitor model is LQ Series and the vendor is SAMWHA(Korea).
The calculated capacitor life cycle is approximately 29.96 years.
The Expected Service Life of HnX-P1 is set to 7 years.

entities.name: HnX-P1
entities.evidence: Life Cycle Report for HnX-P1 Portable X-ray System

concepts.name: Ripple current

evidence.claim: The document is a Life Cycle Report for the HnX-P1 Portable X-ray System.
evidence.evidenceText: Life Cycle Report for HnX-P1 Portable X-ray System

evidence.claim: The report number is A-LCR-HNX and the revision is Rev.0.
The document was prepared, reviewed, and approved on Dec 05, 2024.
evidence.evidenceText: Prepared Han, Jimin R&D team Dec 05, 2024; Review Kim, Myeongseop R&D manager Dec 05, 2024; Approval Hur, Namkyu Quality Management Representative Dec 05, 2024
Rev. No. 0 Rev. date Dec 05, 2024 Revision contents Establishment

evidence.claim: The selected vulnerable part is a capacitor that supplies current.
evidence.evidenceText: Capacitor (Among circuit components, the capacitor component that supplies current is the most vulnerable.)

evidence.claim: The capacitor is located on the Inverter ass’y board at C9/C10/C14/C28/C29.
The capacitor model is LQ Series and the vendor is SAMWHA(Korea).
The capacitor has rated voltage 50 V, applying voltage 32.8 V, capacitance 820 uF, temperature type 105 ℃, and endurance 10000 h.
evidence.evidenceText: Rated Voltage 50 V; Applying Voltage 32.8 V; Capacitance 820 uF; Tmepurature Type 105 ℃; Endurance 10000 h

evidence.claim: The measured ripple current is 9.82 A and the compensated rating ripple current is 4.718 A.
evidence.evidenceText: Ripple current 9.82 A Ia:measured ripple current; Compensation ripple current 4.718 A Is:Compensated Rating Ripple Current

evidence.claim: The calculated capacitor life is 262438.4 hours, equivalent to 29.96 years.
evidence.evidenceText: Calculation life 262438.4 h; 29.96 Y Calculated as 1 year = 8760h

evidence.claim: The Expected Service Life of HnX-P1 is set to 7 years.
evidence.evidenceText: Based on the life cycle selection of the component (capacitor) selected as above, the Expected Service Life of HnX-P1 is set to 7 years.
